case_title: HOWARD, MARIE A. VS PARIANI, RAYMOND L. DBA GRANT MORTGAGE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PARIANI, RAYMOND L. DBA GRANT MORTGAGE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HOWARD, MARIE A. AS TO DEFENDANT PARIANI, RAYMOND L. DBA GRANT MORTGAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWARD, MARIE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARIANI, RAYMOND L. DBA GRANT MORTGAGE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,536.00, DEFT GAVE PLTF A CHECK OF $500 IN COURT LEAVING THE AMOUNT OF $2000 OUTSTANDING WHICH WILL BE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PARIANI, RAYMOND L. DBA GRANT MORTGAGE
